professional_summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable SaaS and enterprise platforms using TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and NestJS. Experienced in designing distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven platforms using Kafka, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Redis, and AWS. Strong background in system design, performance optimization, and delivering reliable software at scale.

achievements.description: Architected event-driven microservices using Apache Kafka for order processing and inventory synchronization across distributed services.
Built a bulk data import pipeline processing 100K+ records using BullMQ workers and AWS S3, reducing manual operations by 80%.
Delivered a full order lifecycle system with third-party API integration, SLA tracking, and real-time operational dashboards.
Resolved queue bottlenecks under high-load workloads, improving job processing reliability and overall system throughput.
Contributed to frontend architecture for a fintech platform handling real-time market data and transactional workflows.
Built websocket-driven real-time dashboards, optimizing rendering performance through React memoization and structured state management.
Implemented OAuth2 authentication, rate limiting, and observability with Datadog, sustaining 99.9% API uptime.
Designed and maintained GraphQL APIs powering third-party integrations with Zapier and external developer platforms.
Reduced third-party integration time by 40% through improved API schema design and structured developer documentation.
Migrated legacy monolith endpoints to modular Node.js services while preserving API compatibility.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Computer Science
